titleStmt.title: SII 11.22: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 22. (B.K. No. 56 of 1927-28). MĒVUṆḌI, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE VEṄKAṬĒŚADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This record which is engraved in characters of the 11th century A.D. bears the dated Śaka 818, Naḷa, Kārttika, śu. 5, Monday (= A.D. 897, October 3, Monday) and purports to belong to the reign of Akāḷavarsha (i.e., Kṛishṇa II). A Mahāsāmanta (name lost) of the Yādava-vaṁśa who was, at the time, governing Kōgaḷi Five Hundred and Māseyavāḍi One Hundred and Forty, is stated to have constructed at the capital town of Meḻiviḍu, a temple, probably of Kōyagēśvara, and to have granted land for the same to Vēdavāhana-Bhaṭṭāraka. The chief bears all the titles of Kuppeyarasa of the same family, who was a subordinate of Amōghavarsha I (see No. 12 above). Meḻiviḍu is evidently the modern Mēvuṇḍi where the inscription is found.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṅgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē taiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svastyakāḷāvarṣa śrīpṛthvīvallabha māhārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭārakara rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhige saluttire . svasti samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ yādavavamśōdbhavaṁ pracaṇḍadōrddaṇḍamaṇḍaḷā
grakhaṇḍitārātimaṇḍaḷaṁ pratāpasampannaṁ ripubaḷajaḷadhisamutpanna(ṁ) śrīkā
ntākāntaṁ raṇamūrkhkhadhavaḷaṁ raṇamūrkhkhakēsari kadanādityaṁ ṣaḍguṇāḷaṁkāraṁ
ḻadabeḍaṅgaṁ nuḍidutappadaṁ śrīmat kē kajjaṁ ballahana dayeyiṁ kōga ḷiyā
ynūṟumaṁ māsiyavāḍinūṟanālvattuma nāḷuttamirddu sukhadiṁ nijarājarājadhāni meḻuviḍuvino
ḷindravimānasamānamappa dēgulamaṁ māḍi sakanripa kāḷātītasaṁvatsarasataṅga 818 neya
naḷasaṁvatsarada kārttika suddhapaṁcami sōmavāradaṁdu mahājanaṅga nūrvvaradhyakṣadoḷ vēdavā
hana bhaṭṭārakara kālaṁ karcci bhūdānakke sa radaynūṟu mattarkkeyyumaṁ
tta rkkeyyumaṁ koṭṭa ralli la
completely damagedThe damaged
tyāhuḥ dēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . sva
dattāṁ paradattāṁ vā (.) yō . harēta vasundharāṁ . śaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kā
lē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē
rāmacaṁdraḥ . © mēṇṭi khaṇḍuga dēvargge . Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavar . vāraṇāsi
kurukṣētraprayāgārgghatīrtthaṅgaḷoḷ Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇadoḷ kūḍida sū
ryyagrahaṇadal caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggaḷaṁkārasahitaṁ pattusā
sira kapiḷeyaṁ dānaṁgoṭṭa phaḷamakkuṁ . Ī dharmmama naḷidātaṁ Avīci modalāge
rppetteṁṭukōṭi narakadoḷoḷguṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇāja
pasamādhiśaḍasōpahārādisaṁpannarīśvaravara mahā r vaiśēṣi
kakumudavanacaṁdrar . jñāyamahārṇnava sarōvararājahaṁsa
r . mi māṁsākaḷaṁkar . bauddhalōkāyatamadāndha si bha paṁcānanar . sa
stavēdāntaśritōttarīyar . pātaṁjalādiyyōga raṁjitar . sōma
siddhāntācchādanācchannar . vibudhajanasaṁstutyar saṁpūjita
pādāraviṁdarappa . nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmat
tadēvarkkōyigēśvaramaṁ māḍidar . mākimayyanāyakaṁ ba
redaṁ . ©
Digital edition of SII 11.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
